paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close, but a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles about the company in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes due 2031, as well as the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns. Articles from sources such as simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance have questioned the bull case for the company and suggested that the stock may be above fair value.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
